    Padding 12
    Margin 15
    HorizontalAlignment center

}

    LineColor red
    BackgroundColor white
    LineThickness 1.0
    RoundCorner 0
    Shadowing 0.0
}

leafNode {
    LineColor gold
    RoundCorner 0
    Padding 3
}

arrow {
    LineStyle 4
    LineThickness 0.5
    LineColor green
}
</style>

@startmindmap
* root
!$arg=2
!while $arg!=0
  !$i=3
  ** $arg
  !while $i != 0
    *** $arg.$i
    !$i = $i - 1
  !endwhile
  !$arg = $arg - 1
!endwhile
@endmindmap

@startmindmap
!$foo = { "company": "Skynet", "employees" : [
  {"name" : "alice", "salary": 100 },
  {"name" : "bob", "salary": 50} ]
}

!$index=1

* The salary of  
!foreach $emp in $foo.employees
  ** **$index** 
  *** **$emp.name** 
  **** is 
  ***** **$emp.salary**
  !$index = $index+1
!endfor
** %size("company")
** %size($foo.employees)
** %size($foo)
@endmindmap
